query: SpaceXAI Grok 4.5 API pricing 1M input tokens

mako.raw:
{"query":"SpaceXAI Grok 4.5 API pricing 1M input tokens","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1311,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://docs.x.ai/developers/pricing","title":"Pricing | SpaceXAI Docs","content":"In the gRPC API (Python xAI SDK), code_interpreter and file_search are not supported.
The 2x multiplier applies to all token types — input, output, cached, and reasoning."},{"url":"https://mezha.net/eng/bukvy/e04b83e4_spacexai_launched_grok/","title":"SpaceXAI launched Grok 4.5, undercutting rivals with faster, token-efficient model | Ukraine news - #Mezha","content":"A new model aims to cut token costs and speed up coding tasks with aggressive pricing.
On Wednesday, July 8, 2026, SpaceXAI announced the launch of Grok 4.5 – a new artificial intelligence model designed for coding and agentic tasks, which the company described as its most intelligent offering to date.
Grok 4.5 was trained on tens of thousands of Nvidia GB300 GPUs, with a focus on meticulous data cleaning, deduplication, and high-quality data evaluation.
By contrast, OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 is priced at about $1 per million input tokens and $6 per million output tokens.
Changes in SpaceXAI’s strategy and the integration with xAI signal the company’s stronger position in the corporate AI tools market, where demand for efficient and affordable solutions is growing rapidly."},{"url":"https://regolith.com/news/grok-4-5-spacexai-price-anthropic-openai-135","title":"SpaceXAI launches Grok 4.5 with lower pricing for coding and AI agents","content":"8 days ago — Grok 4.5 is priced at $2 per 1 million input tokens and $6 per 1 million output tokens. Input tokens include the user's prompt, documents, ...
In June, SpaceX announced the acquisition of Anysphere, the company behind Cursor, for $60 billion in stock.
The same figure was $5.07 for GPT-5.5 in Codex and $11.80 for Anthropic’s more powerful model in Claude Code.
Its offer is particularly competitive against Claude Opus, but OpenAI is also actively participating in the pricing race.
As of July 13, 2026, SpaceX shares were trading at approximately $145.30 – around 7.6% above the $135 IPO price and 813.8% above Regolith’s pre-IPO entry price of $15.90.
Anthropic and OpenAI may react with lower prices, more efficient models or bundled enterprise offerings."},{"url":"https://winbuzzer.com/2026/07/09/grok-45-targets-coding-workflows-with-lower-api-pricing-xcxwbn/","title":"Grok 4.5 Launches for Coding Agents as SpaceXAI Tests Lower Prices","content":"Jul 9, 2026 — Grok 4.5 costs $2 per 1 million input tokens, $0.50 per 1 million cached input tokens, and $6 per 1 million output tokens. It offers a 500,000- ...Read more
Access: Grok 4.5 is available through Grok Build, the SpaceXAI console, and Cursor across desktop, web, iOS, CLI, and SDK; EU availability is expected in mid-July.
It offers a 500,000-token context window, meaning it can process long prompts, codebases, files, and conversation history in a single request.
SpaceXAI’s own pricing table lists Grok 4.3 at lower raw token rates than Grok 4.5.
The launch deepens the new SpaceXAI-Cursor relationship.
The model supports text and image input, text output, function calling, structured outputs, and configurable reasoning effort.
SpaceXAI’s own launch material says Grok 4.5 used an average of 15,954 output tokens per SWE-Bench Pro task, compared with 67,020 for Claude Opus 4.8 in the same comparison.
The company launched Claude Sonnet 5 with introductory API pricing of $2 per 1 million input tokens and $10 per 1 million output tokens through August 31, 2026, before moving to standard pricing of $3 and $15.
Grok 4.5’s clearest claim is therefore specific: developers now have a broadly distributed, near-frontier model with official API pricing, a 500,000-token context window, Cursor integration, and a plausible cost-efficiency story."},{"url":"https://docs.x.ai/developers/models","title":"Models | SpaceXAI Docs","content":"Jul 9, 2026 — Meet grok-4.5 Grok 4.5. Input$2.00 / 1M tokens Output$6.00 / 1M tokens. Real-time conversations, speech-to-text, and text-to-speech. Agent$3.00 ..."},{"url":"https://valueaddvc.com/pulse/spacexai-grok-4-5-half-price-launch-2026","title":"SpaceXAI's Grok 4.5 Launches at Half the Price of Rivals","content":"Jul 8, 2026 — SpaceXAI launched Grok 4.5 priced at $2 per million input tokens and $6 per million output tokens, $2 per 1M tokens Input pricing $6 per 1M … 8 ..."}]}

The focus for this release is heavily on software engineering, agentic workflows, and driving down inference costs through high token efficiency. Benchmarks: Benchmark Grok 4.5 Opus 4.8 (max) GPT 5.5 (xhigh) Fable (max) SWE Bench Pro 64.7% 69.2% 58.6% 80.4% DeepSWE 1.0 62.0% 55.75% 64.31% 66.1% Terminal Bench 2.1 83.3% 78.9% 83.4% 84.3% Features: Aggressive Pricing & Speed: The model runs at fast-model speeds of 80 TPS (tokens per second) and is priced at just $2 per 1M input tokens and $6 per 1M output tokens. Massive Token Efficiency: It solves complex coding tasks using roughly 4.2x fewer output tokens on average than Opus 4.8 on SWE Bench Pro (15,954 vs 67,020 tokens), significantly reducing overall API usage costs. Agentic Coding Performance: Trained across tens of thousands of GPUs specifically for multi-step software engineering, ensuring agentic rollouts can run for hours with high reliability. Knowledge Work Automation: Beyond the terminal, the model can build complex, multi-sheet Excel models, generate native PowerPoint shapes and diagrams, and draft prose in Word. ↗️ More info:
